item.title: The Slowest Ball
item.description: In this video I show you how a snail ball works

media:content.media:title: The Slowest Ball
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you how a snail ball works

item.title: Can i freeze my entire pool with liquid nitrogen?
item.description: While liquid nitrogen is extremely cold, it vaporizes instantly upon contact with water, creating a bubbling effect, rather than cooling the massive volume of water enough to freeze it

media:content.media:title: Can i freeze my entire pool with liquid nitrogen?
media:content.media:description: While liquid nitrogen is extremely cold, it vaporizes instantly upon contact with water, creating a bubbling effect, rather than cooling the massive volume of water enough to freeze it

item.title: Is it really impossible to breathe through a tube underwater
item.description: I see how deep I can breathe with a tube underwater.

media:content.media:title: Is it really impossible to breathe through a tube underwater
media:content.media:description: I see how deep I can breathe with a tube underwater.

item.title: Taking the color out of food looks weird!
item.description: In this video I do an experiment to see if you can remove the coloring from food.i talk about color and what causes color to occur. Then I show you how you can remove color by taking the color out of a strawberry using bleach. I show you what happens when you put food coloring in bleach and also I talk about why it is important to eat things that are colored to save you from bad oxidation.

media:content.media:title: Taking the color out of food looks weird!
media:content.media:description: In this video I do an experiment to see if you can remove the coloring from food.i talk about color and what causes color to occur. Then I show you how you can remove color by taking the color out of a strawberry using bleach. I show you what happens when you put food coloring in bleach and also I talk about why it is important to eat things that are colored to save you from bad oxidation.

item.title: Do banana peels really make you slip in a go cart?
item.description: In this video I test if banana peels can actually make you slip in a go-kart race on a track. I test when another racer throws banana peels during the race and if you just run over a bunch of banana peels on a sharp turn. Then I talk about what makes a banana peel so slippery.

media:content.media:title: Do banana peels really make you slip in a go cart?
media:content.media:description: In this video I test if banana peels can actually make you slip in a go-kart race on a track. I test when another racer throws banana peels during the race and if you just run over a bunch of banana peels on a sharp turn. Then I talk about what makes a banana peel so slippery.

item.title: Creating the smallest shockwave!
item.description: In this video I show you what happens when you smash two giant steel ball bearings together! You get an amazing shock-wave that can burn paper and send it flying it sonic speeds!

media:content.media:title: Creating the smallest shockwave!
media:content.media:description: In this video I show you what happens when you smash two giant steel ball bearings together! You get an amazing shock-wave that can burn paper and send it flying it sonic speeds!

item.title: Controlling a plant with my brain
item.description: I show you how to make plants communicate with each other through action potentials. I even connect it to my arm and control the plant as well.

media:content.media:title: Controlling a plant with my brain
media:content.media:description: I show you how to make plants communicate with each other through action potentials. I even connect it to my arm and control the plant as well.
